one_time_description: First Nations Drinking Water Settlement - Nation received $500,000 in compensation from class action lawsuit
economic_notes: Tanizul Timber Ltd. (100% owned) generated $7,112,448 net income in 2023. Dispute between Chief and Council and directors of Tanizul Timber Ltd. regarding beneficial ownership of shares noted as subsequent event. Nation economically dependent on ISC funding. Gwaii Trust Society portfolio investment held.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient evidence for amounts receivable/payable to Binche Whut'en arising from separation effective April 1, 2019 (payable to Binche Whut'en of $1,463,493 on balance sheet). Tanizul Timber Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method (GBE) - earned $7,112,448 with equity value of $19,315,922. One-time $500,000 First Nations Drinking Water Settlement received; additional amount pending claims process. Subsequent event: dispute over beneficial ownership of Tanizul Timber Ltd. shares. Housing expenses combined Housing Operations ($1,473,693) and Social Housing ($196,894). Budget figures provided for comparison. OSR calculation includes earnings from Nation business ($7,037,495) and other non-government revenues totalling approximately $13.2M.
